info.title: PolyAI Agents API
info.description: Build and deploy PolyAI agents programmatically. Create agents, manage branches, update behavior rules, configure knowledge bases, provision telephony, publish deployments, and update real-time configs.

ActiveDeploymentsResponse.description:
The latest deployment for each environment (sandbox, pre-release,
live). Entries are null when no deployment exists for an environment.

activeDeployments.description: Latest deployment per environment (sandbox, pre-release, live). Value is null if no deployment exists for that environment.

BatchGetConnectorsBody.description: Set of connector IDs to retrieve in a single call.

connectorIds.description: List of connector IDs to retrieve

BatchGetConnectorsResponse.description:
Result of a batch connector lookup, partitioned into connectors that
were found and IDs that weren't.

BatchGetPhoneNumbersBody.description: Set of E.164 phone numbers to retrieve in a single call.

phoneNumbers.description: List of phone numbers to retrieve

BatchGetPhoneNumbersResponse.description:
Result of a batch phone-number lookup, partitioned into numbers that
were found and numbers that weren't.

BatchUpdateConnectorItem.description: A single connector update within a batch update request.

variantId.description: Variant ID to assign, or null to unassign

projectId.description: Move connector to a different project

BatchUpdateConnectorsBody.description:
Ordered list of connector updates.

Each update is applied independently — partial success is possible.

BatchUpdateConnectorsResponse.description:
Per-connector results from a batch update.

Each entry reports success or failure independently.

BatchUpdateResultItem.description: Result of a single connector update within a batch.

ConfigPageResponse.description:
A real-time config page for one environment: its JSON Schema
definition plus the current variable values.

ConnectorResponse.description:
A connector: the voice, language, variant, and environment bundle
that handles incoming calls. Multiple phone numbers can share one
connector.

variantId.description: Assigned variant ID (empty string if unassigned)

DeleteConnectorResponse.description:
Summary of a connector deletion, including every phone number that
was released by the cascade.

deletedPhoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers that were associated with the connector

DeletePhoneNumberErrorItem.description: An error encountered while deleting a phone number in a batch.

DeletePhoneNumberResponse.description: The phone number that was released.

DeletePhoneNumbersBody.description:
Phone numbers to release in a single call.

Releases are processed independently; see the response for per-number results.

phoneNumbers.description: List of phone numbers to delete

DeletePhoneNumbersResponse.description:
Per-number results of a batch release — phone numbers that were
successfully released, plus any that couldn't be and why.

DeploymentResponse.description:
A deployment of an agent version to a specific environment, plus
who created it and when.

version.description: Version hash linking deployments across environments

createdBy.description: Email of user who created the deployment

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the deployment was created

GetConfigPageResponse.description: A single config page for one environment.

GetConfigPagesResponse.description: One config page per environment (sandbox, pre-release, live).

GetDeploymentsResponse.description: Deployments for the requested environment, ordered newest first.

GetPhoneNumbersResponse.description: Every phone number in the project, optionally filtered by connector.

ImportPhoneNumberBody.description: Import settings for a single phone number, including which environment it routes to.

ImportPhoneNumberResponse.description: The phone number that was imported.

ImportPhoneNumbersBody.description: A batch of phone numbers to import, all sharing the same environment assignment.

phoneNumbers.description: List of phone numbers to import

ImportPhoneNumbersResponse.description: The set of phone numbers that were imported.

imported.description: List of successfully imported phone numbers

LookupConnectorBody.description: Lookup payload for finding the connector that serves a given E.164 phone number.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to look up (E.164 format)

MutationDeploymentResponse.description:
The resulting deployment from a promote / rollback / publish action,
plus any test runs it triggered.

testRunIds.description: IDs of test runs triggered by this deployment action

PhoneNumberResponse.description: A phone number owned by the project, plus the connector it routes incoming calls to.

connectorId.description: Connector this number is routed to

PromoteDeploymentBody.description:
Metadata attached to a promote action: an optional message and an
explicit target environment override.

targetEnvironment.description: Target environment to promote to. If omitted, promotes to the next environment in sequence (sandbox->pre-release->live).

PublishDeploymentBody.description: Metadata attached to a publish action, with an optional target environment.

environment.description: Environment to publish to (defaults to sandbox)

ReassignPhoneNumberBody.description: Target connector for reassigning a phone number.

connectorId.description: Target connector ID to reassign the phone number to

RollbackDeploymentBody.description: Metadata attached to a rollback action.

UpdateConfigSchemaBody.description: The JSON Schema definition to apply to a config page.

UpdateConfigVariablesBody.description: Variables to shallow-merge into an environment's config page.

variables.description: Key-value pairs to merge into the existing config

UpdateConnectorBody.description:
Partial update to a connector.

Only fields present in the request body are changed; absent fields are
left alone. Pass ``null`` to clear a value explicitly.

variantId.description: Variant ID to assign, or null to unassign

voiceName.description: Google TTS voice name (e.g. en-US-Neural2-A). tts_lang_code is auto-derived from the voice name prefix. Validated via TTS probe.

projectId.description: Move connector to a different project. API key must have access to both projects.

200.description: List of agents for the current account
List of attributes for the agent branch
Current behavior rules for the agent branch

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: Environment to list deployments for (sandbox, pre-release, live)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of deployments to return

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

delete.summary: Delete a connector and its phone numbers

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

get.summary: List all phone numbers for a project

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Import phone numbers into a project

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

delete.summary: Delete phone numbers from a project

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key

patch.summary: Reassign a phone number to a different connector

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create, list, duplicate, and delete agents.

tags.name: Branches
tags.description: Create isolated branches for parallel development and merge back to main.

tags.name: Agent Behavior
tags.description: Read and update an agent's behavior rules (system prompt, interaction style, edge cases).

tags.name: Knowledge Base
tags.description: Manage knowledge base topics used for retrieval and tool invocation.

tags.name: Variants
tags.description: Manage site-specific variations of an agent using attributes and variants.

tags.name: Deployments
tags.description: Publish drafts, promote across environments, and roll back deployments.

tags.name: Connectors
tags.description: Manage telephony connectors that bind phone numbers to voice infrastructure.

tags.name: Phone Numbers
tags.description: Provision, reassign, and delete phone numbers on an agent's connectors.

tags.name: Real-Time Configs
tags.description: Update runtime values (e.g. opening hours) outside the publish workflow.
